ItacPersonItem.Notes: For his association with the Filomusi see Vecchi `Una seduta dei Filomusi a Bologna e Il ``Virtuoso ritrovo academico`` di A. Banchieri` in Chigiana n. s. 5 vol. 25 (1968). In 1602, the Bolognese Floridi Academy honoured Monteverdi`s presence in town with a special meeting. See his biography by Paolo Fabbri in DBI.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
